zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱承压整理
zh.content:
当前SOL/美元整体呈震荡偏弱结构，价格围绕66美元附近整理，短线反弹动能不足，仍受均线压制，市场情绪偏谨慎。

MACD指标持续为负并运行于零轴下方，空头动能占优；价格已跌破20日均线67.64，中期趋势走弱，反弹更多属于技术修复。

下方关键支撑位关注66.50与65.80区域，一旦有效跌破可能打开进一步回撤空间；上方阻力集中在67.60及68.20一线。

操作上建议以区间震荡思路为主，未站稳68美元之前不宜追多，反弹至阻力区可分批减仓，回踩支撑再观察企稳信号。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana vs US Dollar is currently exhibiting a mild corrective phase after failing to sustain levels above its 20-day SMA at 67.64. Price action at 66.61 shows the market consolidating near the lower boundary of a tight intraday range between 67.06 and 66.51. The structure suggests short-term bearish pressure though volatility remains compressed indicating potential for an imminent directional breakout rather than an established trend.

Momentum indicators reflect weakening bullish follow-through with MACD printing a negative reading at -0.5378 reinforcing downside bias. The absence of a confirmed signal line limits precision but price behavior suggests sellers remain in control in the short term. RSI(14) is unavailable which restricts overbought or oversold assessment. Overall momentum leans bearish though not yet strongly trending implying consolidation within a corrective structure.

Key support is established near 66.50 aligning with the session low and acting as the immediate defense zone for bulls. A breakdown could expose 66.00 as the next psychological level. On the upside resistance is seen at 67.06 followed by the 20-day SMA at 67.64 which remains the critical threshold for trend recovery. Sustained acceptance above this area would signal renewed bullish momentum.

Trading conditions favor a cautious range-bound approach as SOL trades within a compressed volatility band. Short-term traders may consider buying near support with tight risk controls while fade strategies near resistance remain viable. A confirmed break below 66.50 would strengthen bearish continuation signals whereas a breakout above 67.64 could trigger upside acceleration. Until then patience and disciplined execution are essential.
